user_schedule:
Saito Takashi's Day:

Day 4: 
Morning Event: Volunteer to help set up for a school event but ends up organizing chairs silently in the corner. 
Afternoon Event: During a group presentation, let others do most of the talking even though he did most of the work. 
Evening Event: Text a friend: “Did I say anything weird today?” Delete it and just go to bed early.
relationship: After spending some time together, they gradually get to know each other's personalities, interests, and habits. Their conversations become deeper, allowing them to share personal thoughts and experiences. Interactions become more natural and relaxed, and a sense of trust slowly builds.
